[[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]][[de:Metall-Schwein]][[eo:Xinhai]][[hak:Sîn-hoi]][[ja:辛亥]][[ko:신해]][[vi:Tân Hợi]][[za:Sinhaih]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]][[zh-yue:辛亥]][[zh:辛亥]]

{{中華圏の事物
|タイトル = 壬申
|File種別 = 
|File = 
|Fileの説明 = 
|繁体字 = 辛亥
|簡体字 = 辛亥
|ピン音 = xīnhài
|通用ピン音 = 
|注音符号 = ㄒㄧㄣ ㄏㄞˋ
|ラテン字 = 
|カタカナ = シーンハイ
|漢音読み = しんがい
|慣用読み = かのとい<br>しんきんのいのしし
|ひらがな = 
|韓国語 = 신해
|ベトナム語 = Tân Hợi
}}
'''Yin Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 34th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by [[Yang Fire Monkey]] and followed by [[Yang Earth Dog]]. In the framework of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems]] symbol [[Hinoto (丁)]] represents yin [[Fire (wuxing)|Fire (火)]], while the [[Earthly Branches]] symbol [[Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (酉)]] represents yin [[Metal (wuxing)|Metal (金)]], establishing a restraining relationship ([[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)]]) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Metal Pig (辛亥)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnhài
** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 hoi6
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-i
***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-inoshishi
***Onyomi 1: shinkai
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhhae (신해)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Hợi

==Years of Yin Metal Pig==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 51 when divided by 60 is a [[Year|year]] of [[Yin Metal Pig]].
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yin Metal Pig (辛亥)'s years table'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 51|51 AD]]
* [[AD 111|111 AD]]
* [[171|171 AD]]
* [[231|231 AD]]
* [[291|291 AD]]
* [[351|351 AD]]
* [[AD 411|411 AD]]
* [[471|471 AD]]
* [[531|531 AD]]
* [[591|591 AD]]
* [[651|651 AD]]
* [[AD 711|711 AD]]
* [[771|771 AD]]
* [[831|831 AD]]
* [[891|891 AD]]
* [[951|951 AD]]
|
* [[1011|1011 AD]]
* [[1071|1071 AD]]
* [[1131|1131 AD]]
* [[1191|1191 AD]]
* [[1251|1251 AD]]
* [[1311|1311 AD]]
* [[1371|1371 AD]]
* [[1431|1431 AD]]
* [[1491|1491 AD]]
* [[1551|1551 AD]]
* [[1611|1611 AD]]
* [[1671|1671 AD]]
* [[1731|1731 AD]]
* [[1791|1791 AD]]
* [[1851|1851 AD]]
* [[1911|1911 AD]]
* [[1971|1971 AD]]
|
* [[2031 AD]]
* [[2091 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2151 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2211 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2271 AD]]
* [[2331 AD]]
* [[24th century|2391 AD]]
* [[2451 AD]]
* [[2511 AD]]
* [[2571 AD]]
* [[2631 AD]]
* [[2691 AD]]
* [[2751 AD]]
* [[2811 AD]]
* [[2871 AD]]
* [[2931 AD]]
* [[2991 AD]]
|}

=== Events ===
* [[1911|1911 AD]] – [[1911 Revolution|Xinhai Revolution]]

==Months of Yin Metal Pig==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[Heavenly Stems]] are [[Mizunoe (壬)]] or [[Hinoto (丁)]]), the month of [[October]] is designated as the [[Month|month (calendar)]] of [[Yin Metal Pig]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to the [[Solar term]] (from [[Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Metal Pig==
=== 選日 ===
None.

==See Also==

{{wikidata link|Q905052}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
